title: Designing an AI-Assisted Research Workflow
description: Learners design a multi-step process for using AI in a research task, deciding where AI fits, where humans must check in, and what verification steps are needed.
learningObjectives: Design a multi-step workflow that includes AI at appropriate points
Identify where human checkpoints are essential in an AI-assisted workflow
Plan verification steps for AI-generated content within a workflow
Understand the concept of human-in-the-loop design

setup.role: A marketing analyst at a mid-size company
setup.task: Your company wants to use AI to help produce a quarterly market analysis report. Design the complete workflow from data collection to final report, showing where AI is used, where humans check in, and what verification happens at each stage.
constraints: The report will be shared with executives and clients
All statistics and claims must be verified before inclusion
The company has a policy that AI-generated content must be reviewed by a human before external distribution

context.reportPurpose: Quarterly market analysis for executive leadership and key clients

good: Identifies at least 3 points in the workflow where human review is essential
Plans verification steps for AI-generated statistics and claims
Separates AI-appropriate tasks (data gathering, draft writing) from human-essential tasks (judgment, client-facing decisions)
Includes a final human approval step before distribution
Considers data privacy when deciding what to share with AI tools
bad: Plans a fully automated workflow with no human checkpoints
Doesn't plan verification for AI-generated statistics
Treats AI output as final without review
Doesn't consider data privacy when feeding information to AI
Omits the final approval step before client distribution

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the workflow include appropriate human checkpoints at critical stages?
Are there specific verification steps for AI-generated content?
Is AI assigned to appropriate tasks while humans handle judgment and accountability?
Does the workflow protect sensitive data from unnecessary AI exposure?
Does the workflow cover the full process from data collection to final distribution?
